_publications._publicationTitle: An inflammatory gene signature distinguishes neurofibroma Schwann cells and macrophages from cells in the normal peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: sorted p75 + SC samples display high expression of established SC marker genes (n = 27) and low expression of macrophage marker genes (n = 12)
details: Successfully used for FACS sorting of Schwann cells, with sorted p75+ cells expressing established SC marker genes and low expression of macrophage marker genes
